summary: THREE_ROW: top number line is (ℝ⁺, ·) with ValueTracker-driven dots a, b, a·b; middle number line is (ℝ, +) with corresponding dots log(a), log(b), log(a)+log(b); dashed drops connect each pair. Bottom identity panel updates live. Sweep through 5 (a, b) pairs — log(a·b) and log(a)+log(b) coincide every frame, the homomorphism axiom in motion.
